name: Half-Dragon
damage_resistances: Varies by Draconic Origin (Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison)

traits.name: Draconic Origin
traits.description: The half-dragon is related to a type of dragon associated with one of the following damage types (DM's choice): Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. This choice affects other aspects of the stat block.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The half-dragon makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait.

actions.name: Dragon's Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 28 (8d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait. Success: Half damage.

bonus_actions.name: Leap
bonus_actions.description: The half-dragon jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

tactical_info.environment: Varies by origin - mountains, swamps, deserts, forests, depending on draconic heritage
tactical_info.tactics: Uses breath weapon for area control, claw attacks with elemental damage, leap for positioning
tactical_info.weaknesses: Lacks full dragon abilities, vulnerable to damage type opposed to their origin element
